description: Create comprehensive final summary figure with all evidence panels for the MJ1511 hypothesis evaluation
code:
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
import numpy as np

fig = plt.figure(figsize=(16, 18))
gs = fig.add_gridspec(4, 2, hspace=0.35, wspace=0.25,
                      height_ratios=[2, 2, 1.8, 2])

# ===== Panel A: Catalytic residue comparison =====
ax_a = fig.add_subplot(gs[0, :])
ax_a.set_title('A. Catalytic Residue Conservation: Characterized AhpD vs MJ1511',
               fontsize=13, fontweight='bold', loc='left', pad=10)

proteins = ['Mtb AhpD\n(P9WQB5)', 'P.aerug. PA0269\n(PMID:21615954)',
            'S.griseus AhpD\n(B1W2G7)', 'M.marinum AhpD\n(B2HD59)',
            'R.erythrop. AhpD\n(C0ZYQ9)', 'MJ1511\n(Q58906)']
features = ['CxxC\nmotif', 'Catalytic\nHis', 'Proton relay\n(Glu-His-H₂O)',
            'Complete\nmachinery']

data = np.array([
    [1, 1, 1, 1],  # Mtb
    [1, 1, 1, 1],  # Pa
    [1, 1, 1, 1],  # Sg
    [1, 1, 1, 1],  # Mm
    [1, 1, 1, 1],  # Re
    [0, 0, 0, 0],  # MJ1511
])

for i in range(len(proteins)):
    for j in range(len(features)):
        color = '#27ae60' if data[i][j] == 1 else '#c0392b'
        rect = mpatches.FancyBboxPatch((j-0.4, i-0.35), 0.8, 0.7,
                                         boxstyle="round,pad=0.05",
                                         facecolor=color, alpha=0.85)
        ax_a.add_patch(rect)
        label = '✓' if data[i][j] == 1 else '✗'
        ax_a.text(j, i, label, ha='center', va='center', fontsize=15,
                  fontweight='bold', color='white')

ax_a.set_yticks(range(len(proteins)))
ax_a.set_yticklabels(proteins, fontsize=10)
ax_a.set_xticks(range(len(features)))
ax_a.set_xticklabels(features, fontsize=10)
ax_a.set_xlim(-0.6, len(features)-0.4)
ax_a.set_ylim(-0.6, len(proteins)-0.4)
ax_a.invert_yaxis()
ax_a.set_frame_on(False)
ax_a.tick_params(axis='both', which='both', length=0)

# Separator line before MJ1511
ax_a.axhline(y=4.5, color='#2c3e50', linewidth=2, linestyle='--')
ax_a.text(3.5, 4.65, '← Characterized enzymes | MJ1511 →', fontsize=8,
          ha='right', va='center', fontstyle='italic', color='#7f8c8d')

present_patch = mpatches.Patch(color='#27ae60', label='Present')
absent_patch = mpatches.Patch(color='#c0392b', label='Absent')
ax_a.legend(handles=[present_patch, absent_patch], loc='upper right', fontsize=10)

# ===== Panel B: CxxC motif alignment =====
ax_b = fig.add_subplot(gs[1, 0])
ax_b.set_title('B. CxxC Motif Sequences', fontsize=13, fontweight='bold', loc='left')
ax_b.axis('off')

motifs = [
    ('Mtb AhpD',     'CSHC', '130-133', '#27ae60'),
    ('Pa PA0269',    'CYXC', '48-51',   '#27ae60'),
    ('S.gris AhpD',  'CGQC', '132-135', '#27ae60'),
    ('M.mar AhpD',   'CSHC', '130-133', '#27ae60'),
    ('R.ery AhpD',   'CNHC', '130-133', '#27ae60'),
    ('MJ1511',       'NONE', '---',     '#c0392b'),
]

for i, (name, motif, pos, color) in enumerate(motifs):
    y = 0.90 - i * 0.14
    weight = 'bold' if 'MJ1511' in name else 'normal'
    ax_b.text(0.02, y, f'{name}:', fontsize=10, fontweight='bold',
              color=color, transform=ax_b.transAxes, va='top', fontfamily='monospace')
    ax_b.text(0.40, y, motif, fontsize=13, fontfamily='monospace', color=color,
              fontweight='bold', transform=ax_b.transAxes, va='top')
    ax_b.text(0.70, y, f'pos {pos}', fontsize=9, color='#7f8c8d',
              transform=ax_b.transAxes, va='top')

# ===== Panel C: 3D distance =====
ax_c = fig.add_subplot(gs[1, 1])
ax_c.set_title('C. Cysteine SG-SG Distance', fontsize=13, fontweight='bold', loc='left')

# Bar chart: distance in AhpD vs MJ1511
labels = ['Mtb AhpD\n(CxxC)', 'MJ1511\n(C17-C107)']
distances = [3.2, 36.5]  # Approximate for AhpD CxxC disulfide, measured for MJ1511
bar_colors = ['#27ae60', '#c0392b']

bars = ax_c.bar(labels, distances, color=bar_colors, width=0.5, alpha=0.85)
ax_c.axhline(y=5.0, color='#e67e22', linewidth=2, linestyle='--', label='Max disulfide distance (~5 Å)')
ax_c.set_ylabel('SG-SG Distance (Å)', fontsize=11)
ax_c.legend(fontsize=9)

for bar, dist in zip(bars, distances):
    ax_c.text(bar.get_x() + bar.get_width()/2, bar.get_height() + 0.8,
              f'{dist:.1f} Å', ha='center', fontsize=11, fontweight='bold')

ax_c.set_ylim(0, 45)
ax_c.spines['top'].set_visible(False)
ax_c.spines['right'].set_visible(False)

# ===== Panel D: Archaeal CMD family survey =====
ax_d = fig.add_subplot(gs[2, 0])
ax_d.set_title('D. Archaeal CMD-like Family (100 proteins)', fontsize=13,
               fontweight='bold', loc='left')

categories = ['CxxC + His\n(catalytic)', 'No CxxC,\nhas His', 'No CxxC,\nno His']
counts = [51, 41, 8]
colors_pie = ['#27ae60', '#f39c12', '#c0392b']

wedges, texts, autotexts = ax_d.pie(counts, labels=categories, colors=colors_pie,
                                     autopct='%1.0f%%', startangle=90,
                                     textprops={'fontsize': 9})
for at in autotexts:
    at.set_fontsize(11)
    at.set_fontweight('bold')

# Arrow to "No CxxC, no His" wedge
ax_d.annotate('MJ1511\nis here', xy=(0.35, -0.55), fontsize=9, fontweight='bold',
              color='#c0392b', ha='center',
              arrowprops=dict(arrowstyle='->', color='#c0392b', lw=1.5),
              xytext=(0.8, -0.9))

# ===== Panel E: Genomic context =====
ax_e = fig.add_subplot(gs[2, 1])
ax_e.set_title('E. Genomic Context (no redox operon)', fontsize=13,
               fontweight='bold', loc='left')
ax_e.axis('off')

gene_context = [
    ('MJ1508', 'ABC transporter', '#95a5a6'),
    ('MJ1509', 'Uncharacterized', '#bdc3c7'),
    ('MJ1510', 'tRNA methyltransferase', '#95a5a6'),
    ('MJ1511', 'CMD-like (TARGET)', '#c0392b'),
    ('MJ1512', 'Reverse gyrase', '#95a5a6'),
    ('MJ1513', 'Uncharacterized', '#bdc3c7'),
    ('MJ1514', 'γ-glutamylcyclotransferase', '#95a5a6'),
]

for i, (gene, func, color) in enumerate(gene_context):
    y = 0.90 - i * 0.12
    fweight = 'bold' if gene == 'MJ1511' else 'normal'
    ax_e.add_patch(mpatches.FancyBboxPatch((0.02, y-0.04), 0.15, 0.08,
                   boxstyle="round,pad=0.01", facecolor=color, alpha=0.7,
                   transform=ax_e.transAxes))
    ax_e.text(0.095, y, gene, fontsize=9, fontweight='bold', color='white',
              ha='center', va='center', transform=ax_e.transAxes)
    ax_e.text(0.20, y, func, fontsize=9, fontweight=fweight, color='#2c3e50' if gene != 'MJ1511' else '#c0392b',
              va='center', transform=ax_e.transAxes)

ax_e.text(0.5, 0.02, 'No redox gene cluster → not part of AhpC/AhpD system',
          fontsize=9, fontstyle='italic', ha='center', transform=ax_e.transAxes,
          color='#7f8c8d')

# ===== Panel F: GO annotation decision table =====
ax_f = fig.add_subplot(gs[3, :])
ax_f.set_title('F. GO Annotation Decision Summary', fontsize=13, fontweight='bold', loc='left')
ax_f.axis('off')

decision_data = [
    ['GO Term', 'Current Status', 'Evidence', 'Recommendation', 'Confidence'],
    ['GO:0016671\n(thiol-disulfide\noxidoreductase)', 'Proposed\n(not yet annotated)', 'No CxxC, no His, 36.5Å Cys distance,\ntruncated protein, no operon context', 'DO NOT ANNOTATE\n(refuted)', 'HIGH'],
    ['GO:0016491\n(oxidoreductase)', 'IBA from\nMtb AhpD', 'Phylogenetic transfer without\nactive-site validation; catalytic\nresidues absent', 'REMOVE\n(over-annotation)', 'HIGH'],
    ['GO:0051920\n(peroxiredoxin)', 'IEA from\nInterPro', 'IPR003779 domain match but\nCMD family includes non-catalytic\nmembers', 'REMOVE\n(over-annotation)', 'HIGH'],
]

colors_table = [
    ['#d5dbdb'] * 5,  # Header
    ['#fadbd8'] * 5,  # GO:0016671
    ['#fadbd8'] * 5,  # GO:0016491
    ['#fadbd8'] * 5,  # GO:0051920
]

table = ax_f.table(cellText=decision_data, cellColours=colors_table,
                   loc='center', cellLoc='center')
table.auto_set_font_size(False)
table.set_fontsize(9)
table.scale(1, 2.8)

# Bold header
for j in range(5):
    table[0, j].set_text_props(fontweight='bold', fontsize=10)

# Color recommendations
for i in range(1, 4):
    table[i, 3].set_text_props(fontweight='bold', color='#c0392b')

plt.suptitle('MJ1511 (Q58906): Evidence Against Thiol-Disulfide Oxidoreductase Activity',
             fontsize=15, fontweight='bold', y=0.98)

plt.savefig('mj1511_final_summary.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Final summary figure saved: mj1511_final_summary.png")
